allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees help markov-chains expose explicit branches and state transitions instead of leaving the sequence implicit.
Scaffolding helps markov-chains model cumulative progression through bounded steps rather than giant leaps.
allies.source_quote: Scaffolding describes the process of ramping up mastery

structured_tensions.tension_text: Markov-chains conflicts with optionality when the state space branches faster than the transition evidence can support.
Markov-chains conflicts with risk-vs-uncertainty when unstable transition regimes are treated as stationary risk.
